session.objective: Fix issue 2521: security commit gate emits recognized block decision and exit 2 instead of unrecognized deny/exit 0; gate now actually blocks

workLog.entry: Issue #2521 (P0): invoke_security_commit_gate.py emitted top-level {"decision":"deny"}+exit 0, an unrecognized PreToolUse value, so the gate never blocked. Aligned to the working sibling invoke_branch_protection_guard.py contract: added write_block_response() emitting {"decision":"block"}, both block paths return 2. Separated subprocess.CalledProcessError/TimeoutExpired handling with a distinct diagnostic. Updated docstring exit-code contract.

Updated tests that encoded the wrong contract (deny/exit 0 -> block/exit 2) in tests/hooks/test_security_commit_gate.py and tests/test_invoke_security_commit_gate.py; added a CalledProcessError block-with-diagnostic test. Fixed 2 pre-existing bootstrap lint/mypy issues (E501, str|None) the change surfaced.

Exempted generated copilot mirror trees (src/copilot-cli/hooks|skills) from ruff in pyproject: regenerating one mirror surfaced ~1200 pre-existing generator-induced violations (the .claude source is the linted canonical).

Verification: behavioral proof prints {"decision":"block"} + exit_code 2 for a staged security file without evidence; 38 gate tests + 20 sibling branch-guard tests pass; ruff + mypy clean on source/tests/mirror.

nextSteps: Open PR Fixes #2521 (stacked on fix/2348); add behavioral smoke per ADR-033 if harness-level e2e desired
